aba
aba-iu1

FACT: Abacus edge ingestion uses INSERT OR REPLACE (upsert) so re-scanning is idempotent. Both BulkUpsertNodes and InsertEdge now upsert. CLI query default limit is 1000 (was 50). React Router scanner auto-detects route files via (1) hardcoded common locations including App.tsx/MainApp.tsx, (2) glob fallback searching tsx/jsx files for <Route content. All scanners have within-file dedup via Set+counter (#N suffix).

FACT: Abacus project uses go.mod module path github.com/mjn/abacus. Cobra CLI with Version injected via ldflags. Config loaded from .abacus/config.yaml with YAML v3. Makefile targets: build, install, test, lint, clean.

FACT: Abacus scan pipeline after March 2026 fixes — schema v2 (no UNIQUE edge constraint), route IDs include file-derived prefix (route:METHOD-routerName:path), edge IDs include field name (field_relation:fieldName), within-file dedup via Set+counter (#N suffix), test files excluded by hardcoded filter, ignorePaths config for directory exclusion. Default ignorePaths: node_modules, dist, build, .git. Live progress output to stderr during scan.

FACT: Abacus SQLite schema uses modernc.org/sqlite v1.46.1 (pure Go). Tables: nodes (5 kinds, JSON properties, FTS5 triggers), edges (adjacency list, UNIQUE(src,dst,kind), CASCADE delete), schema_version. Pragmas: WAL, NORMAL sync, FK ON, 64MB cache, 5s busy timeout.

FACT: In Claude Code sandbox, Go module cache at ~/go/pkg is read-only. Set GOMODCACHE to a project-local .gomodcache/ dir (already in .gitignore) with GONOSUMDB=* GONOSUMCHECK=*. Do NOT rely on /tmp/.claude_scratch existing — it's not available in CI.

FACT: When abacus is installed via go install to ~/go/bin/, the scanners/ directory is NOT next to the binary. Users must set ABACUS_SCANNERS_PATH=/path/to/abacus/scanners for auto-detection to generate correct scanner commands. Future fix: publish scanners as npm packages so config uses npx @abacus/scanner-express (tracked in bead aba-5nz).

LEARNED: abacus init detectProject must scan subdirectory package.json files for monorepo support. Root package.json may only have client-side deps (@orpc/client) while server deps (express, @orpc/server) live in backend/package.json. Similarly, Prisma schema may be at backend/prisma/schema.prisma not root. Fix: iterate os.ReadDir entries and merge deps from all immediate subdirectory package.json files. Also detect any @orpc/* prefix, not just @orpc/server.

LEARNED: abacus init --force flag re-detects scanners and overwrites config.yaml. Without --force, init exits early if .abacus/config.yaml exists. Auto-detection checks package.json deps for express, react-router/react-router-dom, @orpc/server, and filesystem for prisma/schema.prisma. Scanner paths resolved via ABACUS_SCANNERS_PATH env var or binary-relative probing.

LEARNED: Abacus scanners crash with 'not iterable' when config options are empty. Each scanner needs defaults: Express routeGlobs=['**/*.ts','**/*.js'], oRPC contractGlobs=['**/*.ts'], React Router auto-detects from common locations, Prisma falls back through subdirectory paths. Always use options?.field ?? default pattern.

LEARNED: Scanner node/edge IDs must include source file context for global uniqueness. Express/oRPC route IDs changed from route:${METHOD}-${path} to route:${METHOD}-${routerName}:${path} where routerName is derived by stripping common prefixes (src/, backend/, routes/) and extensions (.routes.ts, .ts). Prisma edge IDs changed to include field name: edge:entity:${model}-field_relation:${fieldName}-entity:${target}. Without file context, routes like GET / from different router files collide.

PATTERN: Abacus two-pass scan pipeline — CLI scan.go orchestrates: (1) filter cfg.Scanners map by Phase field into scanPhaseConfigs/linkPhaseConfigs slices, (2) run scan-phase with 60s Runner, (3) ingest nodes+edges, (4) collect ScanNodeRef from route+entity nodes (or query DB if standalone linker run), (5) build knownNodeIDs map, (6) run link-phase with 5min Runner passing ExistingNodes+knownNodeIDs, (7) DeleteEdgesBySourceScanner then BulkUpsertEdges per linker. Runner.RunScanner accepts knownNodeIDs map[string]bool as 4th param for cross-scanner edge validation.

PATTERN: Claude Code plugin owner vs author distinction — marketplace.json uses 'owner' (marketplace-level), plugin.json uses 'author' (plugin-level). Same structure {name: string} but different key names. Version/category/keywords only exist in marketplace.json, not plugin.json.

PATTERN: Claude Code plugin requires TWO JSON files in .claude-plugin/: (1) plugin.json (minimal: name, description, author) and (2) marketplace.json (has $schema, owner, plugins[] array with version/category/keywords/source). For a single-plugin repo, source is './'. Commands go in commands/ as markdown with YAML frontmatter (description, argument-hint). Filenames become command names (/abacus-scan from abacus-scan.md). Command body is agent instructions, not user docs.
